## Commands Reference

```bash
# Install dependencies
bun install

# Build all packages
bun run build

# Run tests
bun test

# Type check
bun run typecheck

# Lint
bun lint
```

## Session History

### Session 2026-01-16: Lint Fixes & Test Coverage
- Fixed all `Function` type usages → `AnyFunction`
